flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mount Holyoke College rose 21% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.0k → $22.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mount Holyoke College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.5k → $67.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mount Holyoke College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.5k → $67.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mount Holyoke College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (81.8% → 70.7%).
